UpdateTemplateV2.id: Unique template identifier generated by the server; required when updating a template, returned in detail and list queries
UpdateTemplateV2.name: Template name, keep consistent with the original name
UpdateTemplateV2.linear: Whether tasks are executed serially, default false
UpdateTemplateV2.parallelism: Concurrency level; when linear=false, controls the number of operators that can run concurrently
UpdateTemplateV2.operators.name: Custom task name, must be unique within the same template (required)
UpdateTemplateV2.operators.operator: Task ID/type identifier (e.g. BCE::BCC::StopInstance); cannot both be empty with template.ref
UpdateTemplateV2.operators.label: Task display name
UpdateTemplateV2.operators.retryInterval: Retry interval in milliseconds, default 300000 (5 minutes)
UpdateTemplateV2.operators.timeout: Timeout duration in milliseconds, default 21600000 (6 hours); timeout triggers a retry
UpdateTemplateV2.operators.parallelismRatio: Allowed parallelism ratio, range [0,1], default 0; only effective when the loops field is present
UpdateTemplateV2.operators.parallelismCount: Allowed number of parallel executions, default 0; mutually exclusive with parallelismRatio
UpdateTemplateV2.operators.parallelismControl: Parallelism control configuration (ratio/count), object form equivalent to parallelismRatio/parallelismCount
UpdateTemplateV2.operators.allowedFailureRatio: Allowed failure ratio for loops, range [0,1], default 0
UpdateTemplateV2.operators.allowedFailureCount: Allowed number of loop failures, default 0
UpdateTemplateV2.operators.allowedFailureControl: Allowed failure control configuration (ratio/count), object form equivalent to allowedFailureRatio/allowedFailureCount
UpdateTemplateV2.operators.manually: Whether manual execution is required, default false
UpdateTemplateV2.operators.waitOnAgentMilli: Milliseconds to wait for the agent to come online
UpdateTemplateV2.operators.pauseOnFailure: Whether to pause on failure, default false
UpdateTemplateV2.operators.condition: Condition expression used to determine whether the node should execute (structure depends on the specific expression)
UpdateTemplateV2.operators.properties: Parameter values required for task execution
UpdateTemplateV2.operators.loops: List of loop execution parameters; cannot be set together with targetInstances
UpdateTemplateV2.links: Describes the topological relationships between operators; required when linear=false
UpdateTemplateV2.properties.name: Parameter name
UpdateTemplateV2.properties.label: Parameter display name
UpdateTemplateV2.properties.multiple: Whether multiple selections are allowed from the options list
UpdateTemplateV2.properties.selectOptions: New version options list, currently used only by system operators
